creator: marcel.e.peters@outlook.com
text:
There is still one with status New but it is from 2014, perhaps this is dupe then? idk (-> https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=194556 )

The error using this link 

http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portsconcordanceformaintainer.py?maintainer=ports%40FreeBSD.org

is: "The latest Python updated failed. I intend to repair this post-BSDCan 2019 -- mcl"

I found this link in the Documentation:

3.1.1. Choosing an unmaintained port
in: https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributing/
